title: SGO contract hardening: historical CLV persistence and materialization — provider-faithful across all sports

materialization_fidelity.note: market_universe closing-line coverage: MLB 82.4%, NBA 80.7%, NHL 75.5% over 72h window. Provider-faithful per SGO contract — closing values set from is_closing=true offers, pre-commence timestamps handled via separate listClosingOffers() fetch.

mlb_batting_market_universe.note: MLB batting markets in market_universe have 91–94% closing-line coverage. The materialization layer is functioning correctly.

clv_settlement_coverage.root_cause_missing_closing_line: 167 picks have canonical market keys (e.g. player_batting_hits_ou) that the CLV service resolveProviderMarketKey() cannot translate to the SGO provider format (batting_hits-all-game-ou). The market_universe DATA is present (91–94% closing coverage) — the gap is in key resolution, not materialization.
clv_settlement_coverage.note: CLV settlement coverage 33% reflects the canonical-key-resolution gap, not a materialization gap. market_universe has the closing lines; the CLV lookup path does not find them.

materializer_tests_added: pre-commence closing offer absent from listRecentOffers is fetched via listClosingOffers and sets closing_line
closing offer appearing in both result sets is deduplicated by id
multiple is_closing offers for same natural key — earliest snapshot_at wins
MLB sport_key — closing_line set correctly from separate closing fetch
NHL sport_key — closing_line set correctly from separate closing fetch
listClosingOffers failure is non-fatal — materializer continues without closing_line
clv_tests_added: computeAndAttachCLV computes CLV for MLB player prop (hits-all-game-ou)
computeAndAttachCLV computes CLV for NHL player prop (shots-all-game-ou)
computeAndAttachCLV: pre-commence closing offer is used when available before game starts
regression_tests.test_run: pnpm test — all 113 tests pass (market-universe-materializer.test.ts + clv-service.test.ts combined), full suite green, 0 failures
regression_tests.note: Regression tests cover: pre-commence timestamp handling, per-sport materialization (MLB/NHL/NBA), deduplication by id, graceful closing-fetch failure.

known_gaps.gap: CLV settlement coverage 33% — 167 picks missing_closing_line due to canonical-key resolution gap
known_gaps.root_cause: CLV service resolveProviderMarketKey() fails to map canonical (player_batting_hits_ou) → SGO provider key (batting_hits-all-game-ou) for MLB batting props and game totals from smart-form
known_gaps.note: market_universe has 91-94% closing coverage for these MLB batting markets. Gap is in the lookup path, not in data availability. Fix requires extending the canonical-to-provider key resolution in clv-service.

gate_checklist.materialization_faithful_to_sgo_contract: PASS — closing offers fetched separately via listClosingOffers(); pre-commence timestamps handled correctly; earliest is_closing=true per group selected
gate_checklist.multi_sport_closing_coverage: PASS — MLB 82.4%, NBA 80.7%, NHL 75.5% in market_universe 72h window
gate_checklist.mlb_batting_market_universe_coverage: PASS — 91-94% closing coverage for primary MLB batting SGO market keys
gate_checklist.regression_tests_cover_pre_commence: PASS — test added for listClosingOffers separate fetch and dedup
gate_checklist.regression_tests_cover_mlb_nhl: PASS — MLB and NHL sport tests in both materializer and CLV service
gate_checklist.static_baseline_green: PASS — type-check and test suite green
gate_checklist.clv_gap_documented: PASS — 167 missing_closing_line root cause identified and documented
